title: Foundations of Faith
description: A structured Christian training path focused on foundations of faith with lessons, Scripture, reflection, quiz, XP, and completion tracking.

lessons.title: Salvation
lessons.teaching: Salvation is a core part of Christian growth. This lesson helps the learner understand the biblical foundation, apply the truth personally, and practice it in daily life.
reflectionQuestions: What does Scripture teach me about salvation?
Where do I need to grow in salvation?
What practical step of obedience will I take today?

quiz.question: What is the main goal of this lesson on Salvation?
